zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Crichton於1434年出生在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire時，她的父親George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness52歲，母親Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick22歲。她和John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾易亞斯特 吉爾布利德。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Crichton was born in 1434, in Linlithgowshire, Scotland, her father, George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness, was 52 and her mother, Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick, was 22. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell. She died in East Kilbride, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Crichton est née en 1434, à Linlithgowshire, Écosse, son père, George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell. Elle est décédée à East Kilbride, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hatte mit John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in East Kilbride, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Crichtonが1434年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireで生まれた時，父George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithnessは52歳，母Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwickは22歳であった。彼女はJohn Maxwell - Master Of Maxwellとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアエアスト キルブリドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Crichton(이)가 1434년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet-nic-William Borthwick of Borthwick(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 이스트 킬브라이드에서 사망했다.

У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell. Она умерла в местности эаст килбрид, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
